roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/INTC/X: DEFENDANT ENTERS A LIMITED TIME WAIVER/STIPLD: 05-25-22(60)/CONTD: TO SET, PROGRESS REPORT & POSSIBLE DISPOSITION/DOPU: NO DISPOSITION/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X: THE PEOPLE ARE READY TO PROCEED, BUT THERE IS A PRE-CONDITION OFFER/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO REMAIN COMPLIANT WHILE ONHOME DETENTION/X: THIS CASE ENTERS A LIMITED TIME WAIVER/STIPLD: 04-25-22 (60TH)/SATERM/SA1: ARMANDO PEREZ-MORENO/SAORD3/SA2: 1939 MISSION ST, SF, CA/SAORD4: 15 YARDS/SAORD/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE, TO SET/DOP/

/CAL: MOTION TO DETAIN/INTC/MO DENIED/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALLTERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR RESIDENCE (HOME DETENTION) UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE, APPROVED HOME DETENTION ACTIVITIES: WORK WITH SFSD APPROVAL/WEAP/WS/DEF: NOT ALLOWEDTO GO TO LIQUOR STORES/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X: FUTURE COURT OF 01-28-22 IS CONFIRMED/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/X: THE PEOPLE FILE A MOTION TO DETAIN/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 01-31-22 (10TH) 03-15-22 (60TH)/SHER/NB/X: WITHPOUT PREJUDICE/SA1: ARMANDO PAREDES MORENO/SA2: S & M LIQUORS 1939 MISSION STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: 01-19-22 MOTION TO DETAIN/DOP/CONTD: 01-28-22 PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 1 HOUR/DOP/
/CAL: TS, PROG RPT & POSS DISPO/MO PC 1385:20009261, PLEAD TO OTHER CHARGES/EMTERM/CTORD: GPS TERMINATED/
